title: Lakebase Autoscaling updates: OAuth role management, budget policies and tags, and Lakehouse sync
body:
Lakebase Autoscaling now includes the following features:

* **OAuth roles**: Create OAuth roles using the Lakebase UI or REST API, in addition to SQL. See [Create Postgres roles](/aws/en/oltp/projects/postgres-roles).
* **Budget policies and tags**: Associate a serverless budget policy and add custom tags to your project for cost attribution and tracking. See [Manage projects](/aws/en/oltp/projects/manage-projects).
* **Lakehouse sync (Beta)**: Continuously replicate Lakebase Postgres tables to Unity Catalog Delta tables using CDC. See [Lakebase Change Data Feed](/aws/en/oltp/projects/lakebase-cdf).
